sections.name: World and Mana
sections.content: Solar portals opened about two years ago, tearing the heavens apart. Hordes of monsters flooded out, destroying civilization to its foundations. The remaining lands are ruins and ash. Survival has become a luxury. Mana in this world is unique to each individual: some have more, some less, and many have none at all. However, like a muscle, the mana pool can be trained and expanded.

sections.name: Factions
sections.content: The world is divided. Local monsters roam the wastes. Creatures from other worlds crawl out of the solar portals. They are opposed by demons led by Zakhan – cruel but organized. Somewhere in the skies, dragon silhouettes can still be spotted.

sections.name: Sivarus and his Disciples
sections.content: Sivarus is a legendary mage of antiquity. Myths are told about him. He had 12 disciples, endowed with shards of his colossal power. Where the other 11 disciples vanished is one of the world's greatest mysteries, an answer known to no one. The only one who remained in the public eye is Avotu, a fire elf burdened with the knowledge of a bygone era.

sections.name: Avotu: Scars of the Past
sections.content: The protagonist, a fire elf. He is kind at heart and tries his best to act like a hero. However, he carries the heaviest scars of the past – nightmares, suffocating shadows of the bygone days, and a deep alienation from the world. During the disaster two years ago, he was unable to stop the portals from opening and lost his beloved and many friends. Avotu's sword is unique: when unsheathed, the metal absorbs the energy of the environment. The blade strengthens him depending on where the battle takes place.

sections.name: The Strangers (Isekai)
sections.content: A group of people from our world who found themselves in this hell. Alexander, Anar, Yuri, Evgeniy, and Ravan ended up here straight from their previous home. Most importantly, they are best friends. Not just acquaintances, but brothers in spirit, absolutely friendly and ready to tear apart anyone who touches someone in their group. While many of them have already begun to find their place in the realities of Agdash, Anar's fate still remains a question.

sections.name: Guidroli
sections.content: Guidroli are an amazing race of transparent humanoid beings. Their bodies consist of a jelly-like, light-transmitting water-like matter that can shimmer in various neon colors. The true kingdom of the Guidroli is hidden deep underwater, beyond the reach of portal magic, yet many representatives of this race live peacefully on land, adapting to any conditions.

sections.name: Creation Portal Vortexes
sections.content: Unlike small local rifts that can be physically closed, large vortexes are living, expanding wounds in the fabric of reality. Their primary characteristic is the consumption of mana. Any spell directed into a portal is either dissipated or used by the portal to expand further. Closing them with classical magic is virtually impossible, which is why the best mages of the world have already vanished without a trace trying to stop them.
